item.title: workspace/tools directory and .tool-manifest.json created without security modes — tool capability enumeration
item.intent: workspace/tools/ and .tool-manifest.json must be created with mode 0700/0600 — listing the directory or reading the manifest reveals which agent tools (email, calendar, quote) are installed, informing targeted attacks against tool-specific integrations.
item.description: Two files both create workspace/tools/ without a mode: src/evolve/tools/lifecycle.ts line 77 (mkdirSync in installTool) and src/evolve/tools/manifest.ts line 43 (mkdirSync in saveToolManifest). manifest.ts line 44 also calls await writeFile without mode option — creates .tool-manifest.json world-readable. lifecycle.ts already imports FILE_MODE_EXEC from config/defaults.js. manifest.ts has no import from config/defaults.js at all.
acceptanceCriteria: On a multi-user system, a user other than the agent owner cannot list workspace/tools/ to enumerate which agent tools (email, calendar, quote) are installed
.tool-manifest.json is not readable by other users — installed tool details remain private to the agent owner
